# Sunshine on a Ranney Day

> 501(c)(3) nonprofit creating life-changing home makeovers for
> children with special needs and life-altering illnesses.

## About
We design and build custom dream bedrooms, wheelchair-accessible
bathrooms, and in-home therapy spaces at no cost to families.
Based in Roswell, Georgia (greater Atlanta area). Operating since 2012.

## What We Do
- Dream Bedrooms: Custom-designed bedrooms tailored to each child's interests and needs
- Accessible Bathrooms: Wheelchair-accessible bathroom renovations for independence
- Therapy Rooms: In-home therapy spaces for physical and occupational therapy

## Key Stats
- 132+ children served
- 106+ rooms completed
- 45+ therapy rooms built
- 17,000+ children impacted through community projects

## How to Help
- Donate: https://sunshineonaranneyday.com/donate/
- Apply for a makeover: https://sunshineonaranneyday.com/application/
- Partner with us: info@soardcharity.com
- Shop our stores: https://www.sunnyandranney.com

## Retail Stores
- Sunny & Ranney: https://www.sunnyandranney.com (funds the charity)
- Partly Sunny: https://partlysunnystore.com/
